lenses.notes: Zeiss DigiZoom cine-style B4-mount zoom. 6.5x effective zoom. Manual cine-pitch gears, no servo, no extender, T1.9 constant aperture. Color-matched to DigiPrime family. Discontinued. HFOV ~31.5° wide, ~4.9° tele [CALC].
Zeiss DigiZoom cine-style B4-mount zoom. Manual cine-pitch gears, no servo, no extender, T1.9 constant aperture. Color-matched to DigiPrime family. Discontinued. HFOV ~77.3° wide, ~22.6° tele [CALC].
